regions.text: All bodies have an attraction for one another. If the bodies are great the attraction between them is great. If the bodies are small the attraction is small.
If the bodies go farther from one another the attraction gets smaller. Distance Attraction 1 1 2 1/4 3 1/9 4 1/16 5 1/25
Here is a light. It sends out light in every direction. Here is a square.

I put the square at different distances from the light. At distance 1, it gets all the light which is going out between the lines. At distance 2, it gets one-fourth of the light. At distance 5, it gets one twenty-fifth. It is the same with the attraction between bodies.
